story.introduction: Let's configure your uDOS installation with the appropriate settings for your environment.
story.context: This will set up your installation profile, security settings, and system configuration.
story.purpose: Create installation.md with proper system variables

variables.name: INSTALLATION-TYPE
variables.prompt: What type of uDOS installation is this?
variables.help: Personal for individual use, Team for small groups, Enterprise for organizations

variables.name: SECURITY-LEVEL
variables.prompt: What security level do you need?
variables.help: Basic for learning, Standard for most users, Enhanced for sensitive work

variables.name: INSTALLATION-LIFESPAN
variables.prompt: How long will you use this installation?
variables.help: This helps with backup retention and cleanup scheduling

variables.name: MULTI-USER
variables.prompt: Will multiple users access this installation?
variables.help: Affects user management and security settings

variables.name: NETWORK-MODE
variables.prompt: What network access do you need?
variables.help: Local for single machine, Shared for network access, Remote for internet
